analysis.what_went_wrong: The decision to exit was based on a weak technical setup and risk-off environment, which did not align with the market sentiment indicating potential upside.
analysis.agent_assessment: The sentiment agent was most useful, indicating cautious optimism, while the quant agent was least useful due to conflicting signals.
analysis.macro_fit: The risk-off macro regime hindered this trade by contributing to the decision to exit prematurely.
analysis.key_learning: Future trades should weigh market sentiment more heavily when it indicates potential upside, even in risk-off environments.
analysis.avoid_repeat: Avoid exiting positions solely based on technical setups when sentiment suggests potential bullish momentum.
